title: VoiceManager exit-path assertions
prompt:
Open tests/run-headless.js and find the VOICEMANAGER ghost-note invariants test block (it uses const A = P.Audio and a helper ok(condition, message)). Add exactly THREE new one-line assertions to that block, in the same style as the existing ones:
1. After three A.noteOn calls with distinct keys, calling A.allNotesOff(false) makes A.liveCount() equal 0.
2. Calling A.noteOff with a key that was never pressed does NOT change A.liveCount().
3. Calling A.allNotesOff(true) twice in a row leaves A.liveCount() at 0 (idempotent).
Use the existing ok(condition, message) helper for each assertion. Do not change any other code. Edit ONLY tests/run-headless.js. Do not create, import, or add any other files.
